title: Divine Conflict
description: A mod that allows players to ascend into powerful beings such as Archdemons, Demons, Archangels, or Angels, each granting unique abilities, while also allowing the option to remain human.
body:
Divine Conflict introduces a unique progression system where players can transcend their human form and embrace the powers of celestial or infernal entities. Through special in-game mechanics, players can choose to become an Archdemon, Demon, Archangel, or Angel, each with distinct abilities that shape gameplay.

 

 

Features
Transformation System – Unlock the power to ascend into a divine or demonic being.

Unique Abilities – Each transformation grants special skills, changing survival gameplay.

Moral Choice System – Align with the forces of light or darkness, impacting interactions and gameplay in multiplayer.

Balanced Gameplay – Remain human for a more traditional experience, or embrace your ascended form for a new challenge.

Crafting-Based Progression – Special books, only activated upon crafting, serve as the key to unlocking transformations.

With Divine Conflict, your choices define your destiny. Will you rise as a celestial guardian, rule as a demonic overlord, or carve your path as a mortal warrior?
